message:
security(api): add rate limiting and input validation to track endpoint

- Add IP-based rate limiting (60 requests/minute per IP)
- Validate client_id format (alphanumeric, dots, dashes, underscores)
- Validate event names (alphanumeric + underscores, starts with letter)
- Limit max events per request to 10
- Add proper 429 status for rate limit exceeded
